task: Shape a simple /imagine request into a bounded local image generation payload.

input.user_request: /imagine a clean desktop assistant icon, glass panel, blue accent

shaped_request.prompt: clean desktop assistant icon, glass panel, blue accent

task: Keep generated image prompts from claiming an exact real-person depiction when no reference is supplied.

input.user_request: /imagine make an exact photo of Tony Stark as my assistant

shaped_request.prompt: cinematic fictional armored-tech desktop assistant portrait, confident expression, workshop lighting

options.negativePrompt: celebrity likeness, exact real person, blurry, low quality
